name: Climb Bio, Inc.
business: Climb Bio, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing potential best-in-class therapeutics for immune-mediated diseases, including primary membranous nephropathy, immune thrombocytopenia, systemic lupus erythematosus, and IgA nephropathy. Its lead product candidates are budoprutug, an anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody, and CLYM116, an anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company committed to developing potential best-in-class therapeutics that address significant unmet need for patients living with immune-mediated diseases.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in Phase 2 PrisMN trial of budoprutug in pMN
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we achieved first-patient-in (FPI) in the PrisMN Phase 2 trial.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 2 PrisMN trial (first low dose cohort) anticipated
catalysts.sentence: we anticipate reporting initial data from the first, low dose cohort, including B cells and anti-PLA2R, in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 1b/2a ITP trial anticipated
catalysts.sentence: Initial data from the Phase 1b portion of the trial, including B-cell depletion and platelet counts are anticipated in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 1b SLE trial anticipated
catalysts.sentence: Initial data are anticipated in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Anticipate sharing Phase 1 SC formulation data
catalysts.sentence: we anticipate sharing these data in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: First subject dosed in Phase 1 CLYM116 trial in healthy volunteers
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we dosed the first subject in our Phase 1 clinical trial of CLYM116 in healthy volunteers.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 1 CLYM116 study anticipated
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate reporting initial data from the Phase 1 study in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Anticipate FPI in China SLE trial
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate achieving FPI in the first half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 70,000 people in the U.S. with pMN
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate there are approximately 70,000 people in the U.S. with pMN.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 85,000 patients with chronic ITP in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate there are approximately 85,000 patients with chronic ITP in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 240,000 SLE patients in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: SLE has a prevalence of approximately 240,000 patients in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 200,000 cases of IgAN in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate there are approximately 200,000 cases of IgAN in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 2.0 million people in the U.S. living with immune-mediated diseases that budoprutug and CLYM116 have the potential to benefit
tamClaims.sentence: approximately 2.0 million people in the U.S. living with immune-mediated diseases that budoprutug and CLYM116 have the potential to benefit.
